title: Håll koll på kommande vecka – viktigaste marknadshändelserna
summary_md:
# Håll koll på kommande vecka – viktigaste marknadshändelserna

**Feed**: dagen-med-di  
**Published**: 2026-06-07  
**Market Sentiment**: Mixed

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

This is a week-ahead preview episode walking through the most important upcoming market events: capital markets days, earnings reports, and the ECB rate decision. The tone is anticipatory and event-driven rather than strongly directional, with the clearest single signal being Bank of America's two-step upgrade of Epiroc to buy on a positive mining-equipment outlook. Macro focus centres on a possible ECB rate hike tied to a Middle East energy shock and on a heated Swedish housing market following credit easing.

---

## Universe Stocks

### 🟢 EPI-A — Epiroc | **BUY** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 70%

Bank of America upgraded Epiroc two steps from hold to buy citing a positive mining-equipment sector outlook; stock up ~30% YTD at record highs.

#### Reasoning

A cited-analyst (Bank of America) upgrade of two notches to buy is a clear directional view, supported by sector optimism on mining equipment and strong price momentum (+30% YTD, record highs). Hosts relay this neutrally without their own conviction, and a capital markets day is the near-term catalyst, so conviction is moderate rather than strong.

#### Sell Triggers

- if the capital markets day disappoints on guidance
- if mining-equipment demand outlook weakens
- if momentum reverses from record-high valuation

> *"På torsdagen höjde Bank of America sin rekommendation på Eproc i två steg från och håll till köp."*

---

### 🟠 RUSTA — Rusta | **WATCH** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 50%

Q4 (Feb-Apr 2026) report due Tuesday; analysts expect the strong Q3 trend to continue; new CEO transition is a watch point.

#### Reasoning

Hosts flag Rusta's upcoming Q4 report as a key event, with analysts expecting continued strength from Q3 — a mildly positive lean but framed as something to watch ahead of the print and a CEO change rather than an explicit recommendation.

#### Sell Triggers

- if Q4 results break the strong Q3 trend
- if new CEO signals a strategy shift

> *"Analytikerna räknar med att den starka trenden från tredje kvartalet fortsätter in i Q4."*

---

### 🟠 SYSR — Systemair | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Mixed | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 40%

Year-end report Wednesday; new CEO's first report; prior quarter only 1% organic growth and FX-adjusted revenue down ~6%; FX outlook the key uncertainty.

#### Reasoning

Hosts frame Systemair's report as a wait-and-see event, highlighting soft prior-quarter numbers (1% organic growth, ~6% FX-adjusted revenue decline) and uncertainty around how the new CEO describes the outlook and currency situation. No directional conviction — purely a watch ahead of the print.

#### Sell Triggers

- if FX-adjusted revenue keeps falling
- if new CEO outlook commentary is cautious

> *"Den valutajusterade nettomsättningen föll med nästan 6%."*

---

### 🟠 VOLV-B — Volvo | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Neutral | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 40%

Capital markets day Wednesday; market awaits clarity on North American and European truck markets 2026-27 plus electrification and hydrogen strategy.

#### Reasoning

Hosts position Volvo's capital markets day as a catalyst to watch, with the market seeking clarity on key truck markets and the electrification/hydrogen roadmap. No explicit recommendation is given — directional view depends on the event outcome.

#### Sell Triggers

- if North American truck market guidance disappoints
- if electrification strategy lacks clarity

> *"Volvo, där marknaden väntar sig en viss klarhet kring synen på lastbilsmarknaden i Nordamerika, är den så viktiga."*

---

### 🟠 SVOL-B — Svolder | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Neutral | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 40%

Report Friday June 12; investment company focused on listed Swedish small-caps, seen as a read-through on the small-cap market outlook.

#### Reasoning

Hosts present Svolder's report as a window into the Swedish small-cap market going forward rather than a buy/sell call, making it a watch item for read-across on small-cap sentiment.

#### Sell Triggers

- if the report signals weakening small-cap conditions

> *"Då kommer det en rapport från Svolder och vi får kanske en liten inblick i småbolagsmarknaden framöver."*

---

### 🟠 HEM — Hemnet | **WATCH** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 50%

May sales figures due; higher mortgage cap and scrapped stricter amortisation rules fuelling price gains; Stockholm inner-city avg passed SEK 120,000/sqm, activity 'boiling'.

#### Reasoning

Hosts highlight strong housing-market tailwinds from credit easing (higher mortgage cap, removed amortisation rules) driving price increases and surging activity on the platform. Constructive backdrop for Hemnet, but framed as data to watch in the May figures rather than an explicit recommendation.

#### Sell Triggers

- if May volumes or prices cool versus April
- if credit-easing momentum fades

> *"Det här har gett bränsle åt prisuppgångarna, visar flera indikatorer. Och i mars noterade Hemnet att aktiviteten kokar på sajten."*

---
